parsed_review.summary: CP00-241 (RP07.P02.M05.S01-S10, risk A, 10 units, "Permission And Audit Binding" head) is a clean descriptor-only pack and its production_ready posture is well supported. The manifest correctly holds production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review with flag search_core_service_audit_binding_descriptor_verified; the Hermes packet's production_ready_candidate=true is a coverage+binding derivation, not an enterprise-trust claim. Implementation (registry.js, service.js, validators.js) builds only frozen descriptor objects with no-write boolean flags — a Grep for fetch/fs/child_process/network/DB operations in packages/search/src returned only descriptor flags (e.g. creates_database_rows:false), confirming no search/OCR/index/embedding runtime, no permission/audit runtime evaluation, no state/idempotency persistence, no object storage, and no command/Hermes runtime. Coverage matches across closeout-pack-plan.json:412, the review baseline, the contract projection (service_audit_binding_descriptor with all 10 rows + historical_pack_bindings tail = CP00-241), and validateSearchCoreCp241Coverage/Binding; deliverable split contract:1/implementation:6/security_audit:2/ui:1 is exact. Security/audit deliverables S05 (permission_precheck: decision-detail excluded, deny_over_allow_enforced) and S06 (audit_hint_precheck: hint + event-body excluded) plus tenant_boundary_precheck (no cross-tenant), state_transition_enforcement (no write), and idempotency_key_handling (no persist) are enforced by validators.js:1287-1294 and asserted in model.test.js; summary-only review was correctly prohibited and source was inspected via Read/Grep/Glob. Authority boundary is intact everywhere: claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; the review ran read-only with model claude-opus-4-8 and a passing auth preflight (valid JSON, 1436-byte stdout). Hermes H07 appears only as a deterministic evidence-packet/review label (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not embedded product runtime. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are appropriately absent pre-review and are generated from this review. Caveat: validation-command results in command-evidence.json (npm test, rp07:search-core:validate, etc., all exit 0) are recorded claims that I could not re-execute under read-only constraints, but they are consistent with the inspected source. No P0-P3 findings; unrelated dirty v2/loop planning docs were treated as out of scope per the changed-file-scope manifest.
